name: welld-dev
description: Full-stack development plugin for welld Spring Boot Kotlin + React TypeScript projects. Bundles a spec-driven workflow (spec/plan/tasks commands), a 7-role agent team (PO, architect, designer, FE/BE dev, devops, QE) with an orchestrator command, a Copier-based scaffolder command with connection checklists, skills, security and ADR specialist agents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP servers (sequential-thinking, playwright, github).
